hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'git commit'*) cd frontend && npx playwright test --reporter=line 2>&1 | tail -5 && cd ../backend && hurl --test tests/hurl/*.hurl --variable base_url=http://localhost:8000 2>&1 | tail -5 ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'git push --force'*) echo '{"block": true, "message": "강제 푸시는 차단됩니다."}' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
